title: Improved Desert
body:
## Description
Deserts in Minecraft are very monotonous. "Improved Desert" will change this. In deserts, there will be ruins of ancient inhabitants, containing suspicious sand with a small reward. In addition to ruins, there will be trees with only trunks remaining.
## Adds
- 9 types of ruins with loot in the desert.
- 7 types of withered trees.
